description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a streamlined, angular fuselage finished in a matte mauve color with black and teal accents. The cockpit is large, forward-mounted, and fully enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy that dominates the front section. The wings are short, swept back, and positioned low on the fuselage, featuring small, upward-angled winglets at the tips. Twin cylindrical jet engines are mounted on either side of the fuselage, just below the wings, and the tail section is minimalistic with a subtle vertical stabilizer. The surface appears metallic and slightly weathered, with visible panel lines and some surface wear. The overall design suggests a vehicle intended for rapid urban transit or patrol, blending aerodynamic efficiency with a robust, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A compact, angular mauve airplane with a large tinted cockpit, swept low wings with winglets, and twin side-mounted jet engines. The design is sleek, metallic, and futuristic, suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swept-back wings, large cockpit canopy, and prominent twin jet engines mounted below the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, tinted cockpit, symmetrical engine placement, and the angular nose with visible winglets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the same wing and engine configuration, with visible surface details and panel lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engines, upward-angled winglets, and the minimalistic tail section.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with short, swept-back wings and small upward-angled winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted laterally below the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Minimalistic conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, fully enclosed single-seat cockpit with a large tinted canopy.
